name: Endurain
description: Self-hosted fitness tracking service with full control over your data. Track activities, manage gear, integrate with Strava and Garmin Connect, and share your fitness journey with a private community.
author: João Vitória Silva

form_fields.label: Base URL
form_fields.hint: Base URL for internal API communication and Strava OAuth integration. Must be accessible from this container and from Strava servers

form_fields.label: JWT Secret Key
form_fields.hint: Random JWT secret for authentication tokens. Minimum 32 characters. Auto-generated if left blank

form_fields.label: Fernet Encryption Key
form_fields.hint: Encryption key for storing sensitive data like OAuth tokens. Must be a valid Fernet key. Auto-generated if left blank

form_fields.label: Database Password
form_fields.hint: Secure password for the PostgreSQL database (auto-generated)

form_fields.label: Database Host
form_fields.hint: PostgreSQL hostname or IP address. Use 'postgres' if running as a service in this stack

form_fields.label: Database Port
form_fields.hint: PostgreSQL port number. Standard is 5432

form_fields.label: Database Name
form_fields.hint: PostgreSQL database name to use for Endurain data storage

form_fields.label: Admin Email
form_fields.hint: Email address for the default admin account. Used for authentication login

form_fields.label: Enable Session Idle Timeout
form_fields.hint: Automatically log out users after a period of inactivity for security

form_fields.label: Session Idle Timeout (Hours)
form_fields.hint: Hours of inactivity before automatic logout. Only applies if idle timeout is enabled

form_fields.label: Session Absolute Timeout (Hours)
form_fields.hint: Maximum session lifetime regardless of activity. Longer sessions require periodic re-authentication

form_fields.label: Timezone
form_fields.hint: IANA timezone identifier (e.g., UTC, Europe/Lisbon, America/New_York). Affects activity timestamps without GPS coordinates

form_fields.label: Log Level
form_fields.hint: Logging verbosity: trace (most verbose) → debug → info → warning → error → critical (least verbose)

form_fields.label: Reverse Geolocation Provider
form_fields.hint: Service for reverse geocoding activity locations: Nominatim (free, OpenStreetMap), Photon (free, Komoot), or Geocode Maps (API key required)

form_fields.label: Reverse Geolocation Rate Limit (requests/sec)
form_fields.hint: Maximum requests per second for reverse geocoding. Higher values mean faster location lookups but may violate API terms

form_fields.label: Geocode Maps API Key
form_fields.hint: API key for Geocode Maps provider. Only required if using Geocode Maps for reverse geolocation. Free plan: 1 request/second

form_fields.label: Container User ID (UID)
form_fields.hint: User ID for file permissions in mounted volumes. Use 1000 for most setups, adjust if needed for permission management

form_fields.label: Container Group ID (GID)
form_fields.hint: Group ID for file permissions in mounted volumes. Use 1000 for most setups, adjust if needed for permission management

form_fields.label: Environment Type
form_fields.hint: Deployment environment: production (standard), demo (daily reset at midnight), or development (verbose logging)

form_fields.label: Access Token Expiration (Minutes)
form_fields.hint: JWT access token lifetime in minutes. Shorter = more secure but requires more frequent re-authentication

form_fields.label: Refresh Token Expiration (Days)
form_fields.hint: Refresh token lifetime in days. Controls how long users stay logged in without password entry

form_fields.label: Behind Reverse Proxy
form_fields.hint: Set to true if Endurain is behind a reverse proxy (nginx, Traefik, etc.) for correct IP address detection

form_fields.label: Frontend Protocol
form_fields.hint: Protocol for frontend communication: http (default) or https (when behind HTTPS reverse proxy)
